THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POWERS, RON JR REINHARDT, JOSEPH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 26 NEWBURG SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL SEP-04-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFTS TO PAY PLT. ATTNY THE SUM OF $1000 BY 8/7/93 5PM AND $500 BY 8/15/93 5PM. IF DEFTS FAIL TO COMPLY, PLT BY DECL TO THE COURT FOR IMMEDIATE EXECUTION ON THE WRIT AND JUDGMT FOR RENT & DAMAGES OF $4150, ATTNYS FEES OF $350 & $140 COSTS.
